1090801.name: Burning Passion
1090801.desc:
Deal +5% damage for every 6 [Combustion] Potency on target (Max 15%)
Combat Start: If all enemies have 6+ [Combustion] Potency, apply 1 [CrimsonDamageUp] to (highest Wrath A-Reson.) allies in Deployment order
- In Focused Encounters, the above activates when all enemy Parts have 6+ [Combustion] Potency

1090811.name: Burning Passion
1090811.desc:
Deal +10% damage for every 6 [Combustion] Potency on target (Max 30%)
Combat Start: If all enemies have 6+ [Combustion] Potency, apply 1 [CrimsonDamageUp] to (highest Wrath A-Reson.) allies in Deployment order
- In Focused Encounters, the above activates when all enemy Parts have 6+ [Combustion] Potency
- If the ally is a Liu Association Fixer, apply 1 [Enhancement]

1090821.name: Passionate Cheer
1090821.desc: 1 ally with the least SP deals +5% Pierce damage for every 6 [Combustion] Potency on target On Hit (Max 15%)
